title: daemon jmap message_set stores RFC-3339 sent_at violating SQLite datetime invariant
description: Message/set create path calls chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339() for sent_at (jmap.rs ~line 1820) and passes it to insert_message_ext. DESIGN.md §9 requires YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format. RFC-3339 strings (e.g. 2026-04-16T12:00:00Z) compare incorrectly against SQLite datetime('now') output, silently breaking expires_at <= datetime('now') expiry deletion for any message created via JMAP Set.
close_reason: sent_at is display-only; never compared with datetime(). Only expires_at (senderExpiresAt) needs SQLite format, which was normalized in round 8. Not a bug.
